brand.name: Supcase
brand.suggestion: More Video Game Accessories from Supcase

product.highlights:
• [Foldable Joy-Cons Coverage]: Revolutionary hinge mechanism enables Joy-Con controllers quickly assembled and disassembled, protects Joy-Cons from vibration and keeps Joy-Cons firmly connected for a long time.
  • [Premium U.S.-Inspired Design]: Expertly crafted by professional designers with a sleek, futuristic aesthetic and ergonomic. Made with Bayer eco-friendly polycarbonate material from Germany, resistant to yellowing, fingerprints, and dust.
  • [Military-Grade Protection]: Engineered to U.S. military-grade standards (MIL-STD-810G 516.6), this shockproof case delivers 360° defense against drops, impacts, and scratches. 2.5mm raised bezel guards the console's screen to withstand daily adventures.
  • [Enhanced Gaming Experience]: Anti-slip rubberized texture improves handling during intense gameplay. 139g weight-balanced construction preserves the console's natural feel while adding professional-grade protection.
  • [Seamless Dock Compatible]: Specifically designed for Switch 2 with uninterrupted docking capability. Optimized for perfect alignment with official docks and charging stations. No need to remove the case.
  • [Compatibility]: Compatible with Nintendo Switch 2 (2025 release) ONLY. Not Compatible with the Switch 2's kickstand function.

3617558866.detail_text: Metal Vertical Stand for PS5 Slim/Pro/PS5 Material: ZInc alloy+ABS plastic Weight: 155g Size: 15.4*15.4*1.4 cm Package list: Fixed screw * 1 , Vertical stand * 1 Notice: 1. Only stand for sale. For PS5 Pro/ PS5/PS5 Slim Stand Vertical stand for PS5 slim / PS5 / PS5 Pro Disc&Digital console. 4 Non-slip silicone mats on the bottom and screws for fixing the unit are included. This prevents the PS5 console from falling due to unexpected bumps against the console and keeps the console in a stable position. Minimalist stand, save space The PS5 console can be placed in tight spaces as a compact, vertical stand. This PlayStation 5 Stand is boasts a sleek and modern design. It complements the beauty of the PS5 console and enhances the visual appeal of your entire gaming setup. High quality material Made of high quality materials. The center base is made of high hardness ABS plastic, which is heat dissipative and durable. The ring is made of high quality Zinc alloy, which is hard, wear-resistant, and has a smooth and beautiful surface. Improved heat dissipation, easy installation This vertical stand dissipates the heat generated by the PS5 console more effectively by facilitating air circulation. Installation is as easy as matching the PS5 body to the stand and tighten screws!
3617558866.detail_html:
Metal Vertical Stand for PS5 Slim/Pro/PS5


Material: ZInc alloy+ABS plastic

Weight: 155g

Size: 15.4*15.4*1.4 cm

Package list:

     Fixed screw * 1 , Vertical stand * 1


Notice:

1. Only stand for sale.



For PS5 Pro/ PS5/PS5 Slim Stand

Vertical stand for PS5 slim / PS5 / PS5 Pro Disc&Digital console. 4 Non-slip silicone mats on the bottom and screws for fixing the unit are included. This prevents the PS5 console from falling due to unexpected bumps against the console and keeps the console in a stable position.


Minimalist stand, save space

The PS5 console can be placed in tight spaces as a compact, vertical stand. This PlayStation 5 Stand is boasts a sleek and modern design. It complements the beauty of the PS5 console and enhances the visual appeal of your entire gaming setup.


High quality material

Made of high quality materials. The center base is made of high hardness ABS plastic, which is heat dissipative and durable. The ring is made of high quality Zinc alloy, which is hard, wear-resistant, and has a smooth and beautiful surface.


Improved heat dissipation, easy installation

This vertical stand dissipates the heat generated by the PS5 console more effectively by facilitating air circulation. Installation is as easy as matching the PS5 body to the stand and tighten screws!

aiTexts: This dust-proof cover is designed specifically for the PS5 Slim console, providing reliable protection against scratches and dust.
Made from durable Oxford cloth, it offers a lightweight yet sturdy shield to keep your gaming device safe during storage or transport.
Its snug fit ensures easy installation and removal without interfering with console ventilation or ports.
Ideal for gamers seeking to maintain the PS5's pristine condition and extend the lifespan of their console.

3190316059.title: JSAUX Docking Station 6-IN-1 Dock Hub for ROG Ally X Steam Deck OLED Legion Go Gaming Console HB0609
3190316059.detail_text: NOTE: • When the ROG Xbox Ally / ROG Xbox Ally X is connected to the dock, part of the input power is consumed by the dock itself. Using the original 65W or lower PD charger may trigger the message “Not enough power to charge efficiently.” This does not affect gameplay, but charging speed may be slower and overall charging time may be longer. For optimal performance, a PD 100W charger is recommended. • The silicone pad on the stand can be put on/removed to fit various gaming handheld. • Compatible with ROG Xbox Ally X, ROG Ally X, Steam Deck LCD/OLED, Legion Go/ Go S/ Go 2. Thanks to the placement of the USB-C cable, the JSAUX 6-in-1 Multifunctional Docking Station easily fits the ROG Ally X, Legion Go and Steam Deck OLED ports without straining, which is a problem many other docking stations have. With PD 100W power flow and video output up to 4K at 120Hz or 1080p at 240Hz, your gaming handhelds will charge up while being used and will look good on a TV or gaming monitor, too. It's easy to set up, but you'll need to supply your own HDMI 2.1 cable and hold your handheld steady, since the narrow docking station base isn't the sturdiest thing. This Dock is compatible with most of the mainline PC gaming console handhelds. 6-in-1 Docking Station for Handheld: Experience enhanced gaming with 4K@120Hz HDMI output, Gigabit Ethernet, USB C PD charging, USB C 3.2 Gen 1, and dual USB A 3.2 Gen 1 ports. Enjoy crisp 4K@120Hz or 1080@240Hz HDMI output for vivid gaming visuals Modular Docking Station: The JSAUX docking station provides dual functionality. Use it with the gaming console directly on the dock, or detach the base for standalone use as a stand, offering flexibility for both desktop and portable setups. The extra silicone pad ensures a perfect fit, enhances stability, prevents slipping, and improves support angles for a better gaming experience DIY Customize Your Docking Station: Easily personalize your docking station by adding a custom card between the front cover and the dock. Just remove the cover, insert your card, and snap the cover back on. NOTE: Recommended card size is 3.00" x 1.13" x 0.01" (76.3mm x 28.7mm x 0.3mm). Custom cards NOT included Perfect Compatibility: Compatible with ROG Xbox Ally X (2025), ROG Xbox Ally (2025), ROG Ally X, ROG Ally, Steam Deck, Legion Go, Legion Go S, Razer Edge, AYA NEO, AYA ODIN, Logitech G Cloud, and ONEXPLAYER. Supports 100W max power delivery, which is enough to charge your ROG Ally X, ROG Ally, Steam Deck LCD/OLED, or Legion Go at full speed when paired with the original charger
3190316059.detail_html:
NOTE:

• When the ROG Xbox Ally / ROG Xbox Ally X is connected to the dock, part of the input power is consumed by the dock itself. Using the original 65W or lower PD charger may trigger the message “Not enough power to charge efficiently.” This does not affect gameplay, but charging speed may be slower and overall charging time may be longer. For optimal performance, a PD 100W charger is recommended.

• The silicone pad on the stand can be put on/removed to fit various gaming handheld.

• Compatible with ROG Xbox Ally X, ROG Ally X, Steam Deck LCD/OLED, Legion Go/ Go S/ Go 2.

Thanks to the placement of the USB-C cable, the JSAUX 6-in-1 Multifunctional Docking Station easily fits the ROG Ally X, Legion Go and Steam Deck OLED ports without straining, which is a problem many other docking stations have. With PD 100W power flow and video output up to 4K at 120Hz or 1080p at 240Hz, your gaming handhelds will charge up while being used and will look good on a TV or gaming monitor, too. It's easy to set up, but you'll need to supply your own HDMI 2.1 cable and hold your handheld steady, since the narrow docking station base isn't the sturdiest thing. This Dock is compatible with most of the mainline PC gaming console handhelds.

6-in-1 Docking Station for Handheld: Experience enhanced gaming with 4K@120Hz HDMI output, Gigabit Ethernet, USB C PD charging, USB C 3.2 Gen 1, and dual USB A 3.2 Gen 1 ports. Enjoy crisp 4K@120Hz or 1080@240Hz HDMI output for vivid gaming visuals

Modular Docking Station: The JSAUX docking station provides dual functionality. Use it with the gaming console directly on the dock, or detach the base for standalone use as a stand, offering flexibility for both desktop and portable setups. The extra silicone pad ensures a perfect fit, enhances stability, prevents slipping, and improves support angles for a better gaming experience

DIY Customize Your Docking Station: Easily personalize your docking station by adding a custom card between the front cover and the dock. Just remove the cover, insert your card, and snap the cover back on. NOTE: Recommended card size is 3.00" x 1.13" x 0.01" (76.3mm x 28.7mm x 0.3mm). Custom cards NOT included

Perfect Compatibility: Compatible with ROG Xbox Ally X (2025), ROG Xbox Ally (2025), ROG Ally X, ROG Ally, Steam Deck, Legion Go, Legion Go S, Razer Edge, AYA NEO, AYA ODIN, Logitech G Cloud, and ONEXPLAYER. Supports 100W max power delivery, which is enough to charge your ROG Ally X, ROG Ally, Steam Deck LCD/OLED, or Legion Go at full speed when paired with the original charger

3129913333.title: Dobe Multifunctional Cooling Stand for PS5 Slim Console TP5-3583
3129913333.detail_text: Authorized Dobe SG seller with 6 months warranty This model is compatible with the new PS5 Slim console (both digital and disc versions) Description: Name: Multi Functional Charging And Cooling Base Material: ABS Input: USB 5V 2A Charging current controller: 600mA 2 Charging time: approximately 2-4 hours Compatible with PS5/PS5 slim host digital version&optical drive version console Interface: Type-C Compatible with PS5 controller charging indicator light: The orange light on the charging position of the corresponding controller and the charging indicator diagram on the panel remain on, while the blue light on the charging position of the corresponding controller and the charging indicator diagram on the panel remain on for full/standby. Cooling fan: A. Short press the fan touch button once to adjust the fan gear position by pressing the "High Middle Low Off" loop. B. The fan touch button lights up the corresponding icon according to the high, medium, and low gear positions of the fan. C. The fan gear mode supports power-off memory RGB ambient light: A. Press and hold the RGB touch button once to adjust the ambient light in 10 modes: red, green, blue, purple, cyan, yellow, six color slow flashing, 6 color fast flashing, flowing light, and running horse. Press and hold for 3 seconds to turn it off. B. The RGB ambient light mode supports power-off memory
3129913333.detail_html:
Authorized Dobe SG seller with 6 months warranty

This model is compatible with the new PS5 Slim console (both digital and disc versions)

Description:

Name: Multi Functional Charging And Cooling Base

Material: ABS

Input: USB 5V 2A

Charging current controller: 600mA 2

Charging time: approximately 2-4 hours

Compatible with PS5/PS5 slim host digital version&optical drive version console

Interface: Type-C

Compatible with PS5 controller charging indicator light: The orange light on the charging position of the corresponding controller and the charging indicator diagram on the panel remain on, while the blue light on the charging position of the corresponding controller and the charging indicator diagram on the panel remain on for full/standby.

Cooling fan:

A. Short press the fan touch button once to adjust the fan gear position by pressing the "High Middle Low Off" loop.

B. The fan touch button lights up the corresponding icon according to the high, medium, and low gear positions of the fan.

C. The fan gear mode supports power-off memory

RGB ambient light:

A. Press and hold the RGB touch button once to adjust the ambient light in 10 modes: red, green, blue, purple, cyan, yellow, six color slow flashing, 6 color fast flashing,

flowing light, and running horse. Press and hold for 3 seconds to turn it off.

B. The RGB ambient light mode supports power-off memory

3609265134.title: Horizontal Stand For PS5 Slim/Pro Disc/Digital Console Accessories Acrylic Holder Transprent Triangle Base For Playstation 5
3609265134.detail_text: Advertisement For PS5 Controller Dual Charging Dock This charging dock can charge two controllers simultaneously, taking only 2-4.5 hours to fully charge, and is easy to install. The cool blue light fashion design makes your controller look cool when charging. 3 Levels Speed LED Light Cooling Fan For PS5 Slim Disc/Digital Console This cooling fan includes three fans to rapidly dissipate excess heat from the PlayStation 5 Slim console, enhancing the console's longevity and performance.Offering three adjustable fan speed settings, you can customize the cooling power based on your gaming or entertainment needs, ensuring optimal temperature control. NOTE There are two types of products, one for digital version and the other for optical drive version. Please buy according to your needs and don't buy the wrong style!!! Item Description: Wide Compatibility The horizontal stand fit for PS5 Slim Disc Edition & PS5 Pro Disc version. Wide Application The stand is an essential accessories for you to prevent the console from pets or kids’ tripping. For PS5 Slim flat stand is suitable for placement on the TV table, shelves, or any flat surface. You can place the console with horizontal stand anywhere you want. Heat Dissipation Design The Triangle Design of base stand for PS5 Slim , horizontal design is more stable than the vertical stand. Which lifts the console up to provide enough space for air circulation, improving heat dissipation to protect the console. Easy Installation Compared with other brackets, our base holder for PS5 Slim are easier to install and not require with professional tools to install. How to install: 1. Place the console well. 2. Align the position of the gap. 3. Install the holder to the console. If you have any problem for PS5 Slim stand, please leave a message. Product list 2* Triangle stand
3609265134.detail_html:
Advertisement

For PS5 Controller Dual Charging Dock

This charging dock can charge two controllers simultaneously, taking only 2-4.5 hours to fully charge, and is easy to install. The cool blue light fashion design makes your controller look cool when charging.

3 Levels Speed LED Light Cooling Fan For PS5 Slim Disc/Digital Console

This cooling fan includes three fans to rapidly dissipate excess heat from the PlayStation 5 Slim console, enhancing the console's longevity and performance.Offering three adjustable fan speed settings, you can customize the cooling power based on your gaming or entertainment needs, ensuring optimal temperature control.

NOTE

There are two types of products, one for digital version and the other for optical drive version. Please buy according to your needs and don't buy the wrong style!!!

Item Description:

Wide Compatibility

The horizontal stand fit for PS5 Slim Disc Edition & PS5 Pro Disc version.

Wide Application

The stand is an essential accessories for you to prevent the console from pets or kids’ tripping. For PS5 Slim flat stand is suitable for placement on the TV table, shelves, or any flat surface. You can place the console with horizontal stand anywhere you want.

Heat Dissipation Design

The Triangle Design of base stand for PS5 Slim , horizontal design is more stable than the vertical stand. Which lifts the console up to provide enough space for air circulation, improving heat dissipation to protect the console.

Easy Installation

Compared with other brackets, our base holder for PS5 Slim are easier to install and not require with professional tools to install.

How to install:
1. Place the console well.
2. Align the position of the gap.
3. Install the holder to the console.

3483061374.detail_text: ✅Compatible Console: Playstation 5 ✅Brand: Snakebyte ✅Release date: 14 Feb 2025 ⚜️Product Description⚜️ ⚜️SNAKEBYTE HEADSET 5 FOR PS5 - Wired Stereo Headphone for use with PS5 - Foldable and comfortable design - 40mm neodymium audio driver for excellent sound quality - Cushioned ear shells for extra comfort - Mic (flexible, removable), volume control (inline) - 1.2m cable, 3.5mm jack - PS5™ color scheme - Headset holder included ⚜️SNAKEBYTE PS5 DUALCHARGE & HEADSET STAND 5 The Snakebyte DUALCHARGE & HEADSET STAND 5™ is the perfect addition to the PlayStation 5™. Charge up your PlayStation 5™ headset and controllers, when placed on the docking port. The stylish design cradles the controller with a seamless fit and is perfect for storing controllers when not in use. Charge at a faster rate and use the built in LED to indicate the charge and battery level status. Never hassle with dead controllers again and stay charged with the DUALCHARGE & HEADSET STAND 5™. Features: - Stylish design with seamless controller fit - LED charge indicator - Quick charge times - Storage solution - 1 m USB Type-C Cable included ⚜️SNAKEBYTE TWIN CHARGE 5 FOR PS5 There is nothing worse that being right in the middle of a heated game only to get the "Battery level low" notification right when you need to have your head in the game. With the TWIN:CHARGE 5™ by Snakebyte, that stuff is a thing of the past. With the ability to charge 2 controllers at once, you will always have one left in the chamber when its needed the most. Features: - LED charging status indicator to let you know when its time to get back into the game - design matching Game Console - Input--5V/1.5A AreYouGamed? UEN: 53454230A Singapore Registered Company
3483061374.detail_html:
✅Compatible Console: Playstation 5

✅Brand: Snakebyte

✅Release date: 14 Feb 2025

⚜️Product Description⚜️

⚜️SNAKEBYTE HEADSET 5 FOR PS5

- Wired Stereo Headphone for use with PS5

- Foldable and comfortable design

- 40mm neodymium audio driver for excellent sound quality

- Cushioned ear shells for extra comfort

- Mic (flexible, removable), volume control (inline)

- 1.2m cable, 3.5mm jack

- PS5™ color scheme

- Headset holder included

⚜️SNAKEBYTE PS5 DUALCHARGE & HEADSET STAND 5

The Snakebyte DUALCHARGE & HEADSET STAND 5™ is the perfect addition to the PlayStation 5™. Charge up your PlayStation 5™ headset and controllers, when placed on the docking port. The stylish design cradles the controller with a seamless fit and is perfect for storing controllers when not in use. Charge at a faster rate and use the built in LED to indicate the charge and battery level status. Never hassle with dead controllers again and stay charged with the DUALCHARGE & HEADSET STAND 5™.

Features:

- Stylish design with seamless controller fit

- LED charge indicator

- Quick charge times

- Storage solution

- 1 m USB Type-C Cable included

⚜️SNAKEBYTE TWIN CHARGE 5 FOR PS5

There is nothing worse that being right in the middle of a heated game only to get the "Battery level low" notification right when you need to have your head in the game. With the TWIN:CHARGE 5™ by Snakebyte, that stuff is a thing of the past. With the ability to charge 2 controllers at once, you will always have one left in the chamber when its needed the most.

Features:

- LED charging status indicator to let you know when its time to get back into the game

- design matching Game Console

- Input--5V/1.5A

AreYouGamed?

UEN: 53454230A

Singapore Registered Company

Charge at a faster rate and use the built in LED to indicate the charge and battery level status. Never hassle with dead controllers again and stay charged with the DUALCHARGE & HEADSET STAND 5™.

Features:

- Stylish design with seamless controller fit

- LED charge indicator

- Quick charge times

- Storage solution

- 1 m USB Type-C Cable included

⚜️SNAKEBYTE TWIN CHARGE 5 FOR PS5

There is nothing worse that being right in the middle of a heated game only to get the "Battery level low" notification right when you need to have your head in the game. With the TWIN:CHARGE 5™ by Snakebyte, that stuff is a thing of the past. With the ability to charge 2 controllers at once, you will always have one left in the chamber when its needed the most.

Features:

- LED charging status indicator to let you know when its time to get back into the game

- design matching Game Console

- Input--5V/1.5A

AreYouGamed?

UEN: 53454230A

Singapore Registered Company

13748561686.detail_text: Versatile Design This case doubles as a stand, providing a stable base for your Switch when you're ready to play, enhancing your gaming experience. Comprehensive Protection The Sea Preparedness case offers full-body protection for your Nintendo Switch, safeguarding against drops and scratches. Convenient Storage Designed with storage in mind, this case allows for easy organization of your gaming accessories, keeping your Switch and its components neatly in place. Durable Material Made from high-quality materials, this case promises durability and longevity, ensuring your Switch remains in top condition. Easy Access The case's design ensures easy access to all ports and buttons, maintaining the device's functionality while providing protection.

3632905219.detail_html:
Type: Protective Case

Color: Black,Pink,Dark Blue,Grey

Material: Silicone

Brand New and High Quality

Size: 10.9*15.6cm(4.29*6.14in)

Applicable to: for ANBERNIC RG477V


Package Includes:1Pc Game Console Protective Case

Tips:
